fomod.Name: Faster HDT-SMP
fomod.Author: hydrogensaysHDT, aers, ousnius, Karonar1, alandtse, DaydreamingDay, igloomod, SesamePaste, jg1, antpillager, Acro, webspam, full_inu, Backporter, asdt123123, usernameak, KaninHop
fomod.Description:
Hello everybody, this mod allows physics on NPC.
What's the difference with the HDT-SMP mod? - Way faster - Way more functions - Way less bugs - For all versions of Skyrim
You still need to install HDT-SMP clothes, capes, hair, ....
Please endorse :) Please provide videos with lots of NPCs with animated clothes, capes, hair, etc. :)
VR functionalities by alandtse. Papyrus functionalities by SesamePaste. Plugin functionalities by jg1. Non-hookean physics functionalities by webspam. Port to CommonLib by Kernel Panic. Engine optimizations by asdt123123. Current active developers at the time of this writing, ordered by date of involvement in HDT-SMP: alandtse, DaydreamingDay, Backporter, asdt123123, usernameak, KaninHop.
